title: distimake hasslerianus
intro: Distimake hasslerianus, also known as the "climbing morning glory", is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Distimake hasslerianus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Distimake hasslerianus can be made into a tea or tincture, and has also been used in traditional remedies as an infusion or poultice.
